name: Bernard Peiffer
abstract: Bernard Peiffer (pie-fer) (23 October 1922 – 7 September 1976) was a French jazz pianist, composer, and teacher. His nickname was "Le Most", for his piano skills.

about_quotes.speaker: Big Chielf Moore
about_quotes.evidence: The front line was myself, Hot Lips Page and Don Byas and a French rhythm section. I think the piano player... His name is Bernard Peiffer.

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Coleman
about_quotes.evidence: Barney, the pianist, was Bernard Peiffer. ... I rehearsed with the musicians.
